launch: Open the packaged vaexcore console desktop app
degradedStates: Twitch credentials missing or OAuth scopes incomplete
Discord bot token or guild setup incomplete
Relay credentials missing when relay-assisted mode is selected

records: Local SQLite command configuration, audit log, giveaways, timers, moderation, and queue state
secrets: Electron safeStorage encrypted local secrets envelope when available
Legacy plaintext local.secrets.json fallback for CLI and smoke contexts
logs: Redacted setup diagnostics and support bundle data
Suite timeline events under the shared Vaexcore suite directory

inbound: Suite command documents from Studio, Pulse, Relay, or Hub-class launchers
Studio chat marker and giveaway event requests

security.networkPolicy: Localhost-only operator API; external platform calls require explicit operator setup or action
sensitiveActions: Twitch OAuth refresh and creator operations
Discord server layout creation and announcement sends
